name: Blind Employee Lookup
description: An employee directory lookup returns only 'found' or 'not found'. Use blind boolean-based SQL injection to extract the flag character by character.
briefing: You're conducting a penetration test against Vaultline Industries' internal employee directory. The lookup endpoint accepts an employee ID and returns only whether the employee exists or not — no data is displayed. However, you suspect the backend query is vulnerable to SQL injection. A table called 'secrets' is rumored to hold a flag. Since no data is reflected, you'll need to use blind boolean-based techniques to extract it one character at a time.
objective: Use blind boolean-based SQL injection to extract the flag from the secrets table, character by character.
author: h4ck0rman
